name: content-writer
description: Multi-platform content generator for Chinese social media. Produces publish-ready posts for 小红书, 知乎, 公众号, and 抖音 with platform-native formatting, hooks, and CTAs.

changes: 从 OpenClaw 技能市场导入

quickstart.overview: 根据平台格式生成中文社交媒体内容
quickstart.example: 帮我在小红书写一篇春日穿搭分享，休闲风格，500字左右，带图片建议
quickstart.notes: 内容需原创，避免绝对化用语，数据可查证，符合平台字数规范
